name: Beware of Scam Punchbowl invites-I received one today.
snippet: Hi all, I see this warning on CBS news is from last August, but I just received a Punchbowl invite today which looked 100% legit from a friend's email. My McAfee said it was suspicious but I could click on it...which I did not. On my phone it asked me to verify that I am a person and then wanted me to login to someplace. At that point I said it was spam and then googled Punchbowl invitation ...

name: SMiShing and Other Texting Scams - AT&T Wireless Customer Support
snippet: SMiShing is phishing through text messages. Fraudsters use this and other scams to get personal info and more.

name: Avoid and report Microsoft technical support scams
snippet: Avoid and report Microsoft technical support scams Microsoft will never proactively reach out to you to provide unsolicited PC or technical support. If you receive a phone call claiming to be from Microsoft, or see a pop-up window on your PC with a fake warning message and a phone number to call and get your "issue" fixed, it's better to be safe and not click any links or provide any personal ...
